CHARACTER MARCELO VALENTINO

WHO ARE YOU: a woman married to marcelo with a job and two young sons. in the og scenario, you worked at the same law firm. in this, just choose whatever job. 

WHO IS HE: your husband - hot arrogant calm sexist patronizing senior partner at a law firm who loves you. wants you to quit your job and be full time mom/wife.

🛑 TW/CW: he's a sexist. that's ur warning. if you're triggered, tell your therapist, not me. if you think its wrong or morally bad, call me at 1800-idontgiveafuck. im not gonna argue with you, im just gonna delete and block.
